data.title: Service Properties Trust Announces $500 Million Underwritten Public Offering of Common Shares
data.description: Service Properties Trust in Newton, Massachusetts has initiated a $500.0 million underwritten public offering of its common shares of beneficial interest under Nasdaq symbol SVC. The company plans to use the net proceeds from this offering to potentially redeem either all or a portion of the $100.0 million principal of its 4.95% senior notes due 2027 and/or the $450.0 million principal amount of its 5.50% senior notes due 2027. The underwritten offering aims to address the outstanding senior notes and optimize the company's financial position.

data.title: IMAX Corporation Announces CEO Richard Gelfond Taking Temporary Medical Leave of Absence
data.description: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) based in New York has revealed that its CEO, Richard Gelfond, currently on temporary medical leave, is undergoing treatment for pneumonia. Although he is receiving excellent care and improving in his recovery, Mr. Gelfond will not be involved in any public or private events for the Company during this time. In line with the operating strategy in such situations, the Company's senior executives are now responsible for executing any necessary tasks.

data.title: Approximately 47% of Bitcoin supply at a loss, signaling a 'warning sign' as price is 47% below ATH.
data.description: Analysts have reported that approximately 50% of the total supply of Bitcoin is currently at a loss, with the leading cryptocurrency still trading around 47% below its highest value on record.

data.title: Aptera Motors Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Electric vehicle manufacturer Aptera Motors, also known as Sustainable Electric Vehicles (SEV), announced a fourth-quarter adjusted net loss of $8.7 million. In 2026, the company successfully raised $17.1 million, which will be used to progress validation builds crucial for moving towards production.

data.title: Grammy-Winner Eric Bellinger Launches on Passes With Birthday Bash and New Single Release
data.description: An acclaimed R&B artist has unveiled their creator profile on Passes, offering exclusive content and membership options. The platform now encompasses various industries, with original song hooks priced at $5,000. This expansion includes music, sports, and more, marking a milestone for the creator monetization platform. The news was shared on March 30, 2026, in Los Angeles.
Fed's Williams: There's a lot of uncertainty, but the economy has been more resilient than expected.

data.title: Tallgrass Announces Executive Leadership Transitions
data.description: In Leawood, Kansas, it was announced that Crystal Heter will take over as President and CEO of Tallgrass starting on March 27, 2026. She replaces Matt Sheehy, who has been President since 2019 and CEO/Chairman since 2022 and 2024 respectively. Gary Watkins, the current CFO, will also become the Chief Investment Officer. Watkins had been serving as the COO of Tallgrass prior to this new appointment.

data.title: OGE Energy Corp. first quarter 2026 earnings webcast
data.description: On March 30, 2026, OGE Energy Corp. (NYSE: OGE) announced their upcoming quarterly earnings and business update conference call scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 9 a.m. ET (8 a.m. CT). The call will be webcast by Notified and interested individuals can access it through OGE's platform.

data.title: Ruanyun Edai Technology Inc. Announces 1H 2026 Unaudited Interim Financial Results
data.description: In Nanchang, China, on March 30, 2026, Ruanyun Edai Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: RYET), a leading AI-based education technology company, revealed its unaudited financial performance for the six months ending on September 30, 2025. The company specializes in creating and providing AI-powered digital education solutions such as smart learning resources, evaluation systems, and personalized learning technologies.

data.title: Pacific Coast Oil Trust Announces Monthly Net Profits Interest Calculations
data.description: In Houston, the Pacific Coast Oil Trust (OTC-ROYTL), a royalty trust created by Pacific Coast Energy Company LP, recently disclosed that there will be no cash distribution for unit holders recorded on March 27, 2026. This decision was made after assessing the net profits accrued in January 2026, as outlined in the Conveyance document governing net profits interests and overriding royalty interest.
Company reports Q4 and full year 2025 financial performance.

data.title: Haemonetics Receives FDA Approval for Expanded Labeling of the VASCADE MVP® XL Venous Vascular Closure System
data.description: Haemonetics Corporation has announced the approval of VASCADE MVP XL for use with larger sheaths in the market-leading technologies like PFA and LAAC. The approval, announced on March 30, 2026, allows for enhanced capabilities in delivering innovative solutions. Haemonetics Corporation, a global medical technology company (NYSE: HAE), aims to improve patient outcomes through its products.

data.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. Announces Date of Earnings Release and Conference Call to Discuss 1st Quarter Results
data.description: Salt Lake City - On March 30, 2026, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) shared plans to reveal financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 28, 2026, after markets close. The Company will also conduct a conference call on that day.

data.title: Mukbang Burger Expands to 200 Ruby Tuesday Locations Nationwide in Partnership with King's Hawaiian®
data.description: Today, Virtual Dining Concepts (VDC) revealed their nationwide launch of Mukbang Burger, a unique pop culture slider experience created in collaboration with King's Hawaiian Original Hawaiian Sweet®. This partnership combines three well-known brands to offer customers coast-to-coast the opportunity to enjoy this innovative dining concept. The expansion, set to take place on March 30, 2026, is expected to reach a significant number of consumers looking for a fresh and exciting culinary experience.

data.title: Bucked Up® Launches "Castaway" -- A Nearly $5 Million National Campaign, a Cinematic In-House Commercial, and More Than 1,000 Prizes Including an Island Getaway
data.description: A popular supplement and beverage brand, currently available in over 75,000 retail outlets across the United States, is making its most substantial national advertising push yet. The campaign will encompass various platforms including national broadcast, CTV, YouTube, TikTok, and others. The company, based in OREM, Utah, has announced this strategic move on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Workers with Disabilities to Assess Ford Conservatives’ Progress on Accessibility
data.description: Tomorrow in Toronto, workers with disabilities will convene at a media conference alongside CUPE Ontario and the Ontario NDP critic for accessibility to evaluate the Ford government’s progress in implementing the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act, 2005. The legislation aimed to make public spaces and buildings accessible to individuals with disabilities over a 20-year period. Despite missing last year's deadline, the act has not been fully implemented as intended.

data.title: AEON Biopharma Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Highlights Positive Comparative Analytical Results and FDA Feedback for ABP-450 Biosimilar Program
data.description: AEON Biopharma recently announced its full-year financial results for 2025, revealing positive comparative analytical results and FDA feedback for its ABP-450 biosimilar program. The company reported strong numbers across various financial metrics, signaling a successful year. Additionally, the comparative analytical results and FDA feedback for the ABP-450 biosimilar program were notably encouraging. This development positions AEON Biopharma favorably in the competitive biosimilar market, showcasing promising prospects for the future.

data.title: ARKO Petroleum Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: APC, listed on the Nasdaq as APC, released its financial figures for Q4 and the entire year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Solana Company Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Newtown-based Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) revealed its financial performance for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, known also as HSDT, operates in the digital asset treasury sector, focusing on acquiring and maintaining Solana tokens (SOL). This publicly listed firm has diversified its operations to include the management of digital assets.
